Hero.title: Product-focused frontend.
Hero.description: I build interfaces for real product needs: complex forms, authentication, async state, and clear user experiences that stay maintainable as they grow.

About.title: Steady growth.
About.description: I stay motivated by personal and professional growth, and I enjoy understanding the logic behind algorithms, design patterns, programming languages, and architectures.

items.title: Solid technical base
items.body: I work with a focus on logic, maintainability, and frontend decisions that can scale over time.

items.title: Real product work
items.body: I am comfortable building real applications with forms, business-driven flows, and reusable UI.

items.summary: I build web applications with Next.js and React, using React Query, Yup, React Hook Form, Material UI, Sass, and AWS Cognito for dynamic interfaces, form validation, and secure authentication.
I led component migration into a reusable UI library, implemented state models decoupled from the UI, built complex HOCs, and integrated metrics libraries to improve load time and performance.
Migration of a Django application to React, improving performance and modernizing clinical workflow flows with a more current architecture.

SelectedWork.title: My work.
SelectedWork.description: Three projects that show product thinking, interface quality, and technical decisions closer to real work.

projects.title: TesloShop
projects.summary: Frontend ecommerce with catalog, product detail, PayPal checkout, and state management with Zustand.
projects.impact: Includes authentication, purchase flow, and a base closer to a real ecommerce product.

projects.title: AdminTodo
projects.summary: Admin dashboard for task management, states, and visual organization with components aimed at real product use.
projects.imageAlt: Concept preview of the AdminTodo project
projects.impact: Focused on dashboard structure, visual hierarchy, and organizing internal product flows.

projects.title: Blizzard Page
projects.summary: Visual landing page inspired by Blizzard, focused on composition, hierarchy, navigation, and graphic presence.
projects.imageAlt: Preview of the Blizzard Page project
projects.impact: Built to show composition, visual direction, and the ability to recreate a strong reference.

Contact.title: Let's talk.
Contact.description: Available for new projects and collaborations.
